title: Coin in the Bottle 10p / Folding Coin Magic Trick/Close Up Coin Magic
features: A spectator is handed a regular bottle to examine. Next, a coin is borrowed and magically made to penetrate through the bottom of the solid bottle!
The bottle is then turned upside down to show that the coin does not fit through its neck. But when the magician shakes the bottle, the coin falls out of it!
A precision machined and cut coin that actually folds, complete with Instructions. The folding action allows you to put the coin in a bottle and then remove it, requires minimal practice.
Single Fold Mechanism. Can Be used in other routines as well. Don't forget to check out our shop for other items.
Fast Dispatch! With 5 Extra Replacement Bands (Free of Cost)
